product_overview: A local-first review workbench for inspecting, editing, and packaging job pipelines stored under data/jobs/. Provides a portfolio dashboard, file explorer, multi-tab job workspace (graph/extraction/document views), node editor, and deployment checklist.
core_goals: Expose local job artifacts and pipeline state for human-in-the-loop review and editing
Provide multi-view job workspace to inspect graph matches, extractions, and generated documents
Allow safe edits to JSON/Markdown artifacts that persist back to the local data/jobs/ tree
Surface deployment/package status and a checklist for final submission (UI-level)
Offer developer sandboxes and tools for debugging and iterating on node data

features.name: Portfolio Dashboard
features.description: Overview of all local jobs with job tree, stats, next review target, and links to developer tools and data explorer.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See total job stats (total, pending review, completed, failed) -> See next review target job with source and job ID -> Click "Open job workspace" link -> Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId -> See job sidebar with source, job ID, current node status

Navigate to / -> Browse jobs in collapsible tree -> Click a collapsed source node -> See children jobs expand -> Click a job entry without artifacts -> See job card with missing/empty state or no evidence bank present

features.name: Data Explorer
features.description: Browse the data/jobs/ directory tree and preview files (JSON, markdown, images) inline to inspect raw job artifacts.
user_flows: Navigate to /explorer -> See root directory listing of data/jobs/ -> Click on a folder -> URL updates with ?path= parameter -> See folder contents and item counts -> Click a JSON file -> See pretty-printed JSON preview

Navigate to /explorer -> Click on an image file (PNG/JPG/SVG) -> See image rendered inline -> Click on a very large or unsupported file -> See size indicator and preview failure or 'cannot preview' message

features.name: Job Workspace — Graph Explorer (View 1)
features.description: Graph-based view that renders pipeline nodes and match edges, shows match reasoning, and surfaces match scores.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId -> Ensure View 1 tab selected -> See ReactFlow graph of pipeline nodes and edges -> Click an edge -> See match reasoning text appear below graph

Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId -> Ensure View 1 tab selected -> Try to toggle Evidence Bank in sidebar -> Observe Evidence Bank missing (not implemented) or nav highlight confusion caused by shared URL highlighting both Evidence Bank and Graph Explorer

features.name: Job Workspace — Document to Graph (Extraction Review, View 2)
features.description: Line-by-line document extraction review where source markdown lines map to extracted requirements and spans; select lines to view associated requirement metadata.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId -> Click the View 2 tab -> See source markdown rendered as line-level buttons -> Click a line -> See requirement panel show ID, priority and spans and graph highlight corresponding requirement node
Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId -> Click the View 2 tab -> Attempt to edit a requirement inline -> See UI instructing to open Node Editor (inline edit not available) or no edit controls present

features.name: Job Workspace — Graph to Document (View 3)
features.description: Document generation review where graph nodes map to document sections allowing preview and edits to generated documents.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId -> Click the View 3 tab -> See generated document preview with per-section content -> Click a section -> See insertion options for evidence snippets (if available) or cursor focus for editing

Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId -> Click the View 3 tab -> Attempt to view section-level version diff -> See no diff available and only read-only preview or simple textarea (rich diff not implemented)

features.name: Pipeline Outputs (Outputs tab)
features.description: List and preview pipeline output artifacts for a selected stage (JSON, Markdown, PNG), with save support for proposed changes.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId -> Select Outputs tab -> See file list for the selected stage -> Click a markdown file (cv.md) -> See markdown editor (textarea) with file contents -> Edit content -> Click Save -> File saved back to nodes/<node>/proposed/*.md

Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId -> Select Outputs tab -> Click a JSON file -> See raw textarea JSON editor -> Paste invalid JSON -> Click Save -> See validation error or failure to save (no rich editor or schema validation may reject save)

features.name: Node Editor
features.description: Node-level JSON editor and ReactFlow visualization that lets users inspect and save node state.json for extract and match stages.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId/node-editor -> See ReactFlow graph of nodes -> Click a node -> Sidebar JSON editor focuses on the node's path -> Edit a JSON path value -> Click Save -> See the updated state.json persisted to disk
Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId/node-editor -> Click a node -> Edit JSON with syntax error -> Click Save -> See save blocked or error message (no undo/redo history available)

features.name: Deployment Page
features.description: Mission status and deployment checklist showing which pipeline stages are complete and offering a (UI-only) submit action when ready.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId/deployment -> See mission status and checklist of completed stages with check_circle icons -> See "Submit Application" button disabled until all checklist items are complete -> See resume command and package file listing

Navigate to /jobs/:source/:jobId/deployment -> See all checklist items appear complete -> Click "Submit Application" button -> See button remains disabled or no backend submission occurs (submit endpoint missing)

features.name: Developer Sandboxes and Tools
features.description: Developer-facing sandbox pages for testing components and node interactions (text tagger, node editor sandbox, CV graph editor).
user_flows: Navigate to /sandbox -> See list of sandbox tools -> Click TextTagger sandbox -> Navigate to /sandbox/text_tagger -> Interact with text-to-node tagging controls and observe immediate sandbox state changes
Navigate to /sandbox/node_editor -> Try undo/redo keyboard shortcuts expecting full history -> Observe no global undo/redo and limited sandbox-only features (gap vs. desired Node Editor history)

tech_stack.ui_library: Custom CSS (Terran Command dark theme) + Material Symbols Outlined icons + ReactFlow

routes.description: Application portfolio dashboard - shows review queue, job stats, job tree, and developer tools
File browser for data/jobs/ directory - browse folders, preview JSON/Markdown/images
Job workspace - evidence bank, graph explorer, extraction view, documents view
Mission status and deployment checklist for a job
Node editor for a specific job

features.name: Portfolio Dashboard
features.description: Shows all jobs in a tree view with stats, review queue highlighting, and developer tools
user_interactions: View total job stats (total, pending review, completed, failed)
View next review target job with source, job ID, and current node
Click "Open job workspace" link to navigate to a job
Browse jobs in collapsible tree organized by source and status
Click "Browse all local job artifacts" link to go to Data Explorer
Expand "Developer Tools" section to see sandbox links and boot sequence

features.name: Data Explorer
features.description: Browse the data/jobs/ directory tree and preview file contents inline
user_interactions: View root directory listing of data/jobs/
Click on a folder to navigate into it (updates ?path= query param)
Click on a file to preview its contents
Use breadcrumb navigation to go back up the directory tree
View JSON files pretty-printed
View text/markdown files as plain text
View image files (PNG/JPG/GIF/SVG) inline
See size indicator for files
See item count for directories

features.name: Job Workspace
features.description: Multi-view workspace for reviewing a job's pipeline state, evidence, graph, and documents
user_interactions: View job sidebar with source, job ID, current node status
Navigate between Evidence Bank, Graph Explorer, Extraction, Documents via sidebar
View graph of pipeline nodes in ReactFlow canvas
View extraction data (requirements, constraints, text spans)
View and edit documents (motivation letter, CV, email)
Jump to any stage via Stage Jump links in sidebar

features.name: Deployment Page
features.description: Mission status checklist showing which stages are complete and enabling application submission
user_interactions: View mission status (bundle pending/ready)
View checklist of completed stages with check_circle icons
See "Submit Application" button (disabled until all stages complete)
View resume command for continuing pipeline

known_limitations.issue: Evidence Bank and Graph Explorer nav links share the same URL so both highlight active simultaneously
known_limitations.impact: Minor UX confusion - two nav items appear active on the same page

known_limitations.issue: ScrapeDiagnosticsTab component referenced in checklist but not implemented
known_limitations.impact: Scrape diagnostics only accessible via Pipeline Outputs generic view

known_limitations.issue: Submit Application button always disabled - no backend endpoint for actual submission
